entry.title: Re: New search box in Eclipse ADT not working properly
entry.content: Had the same issue a while ago, posted a question and was given the same suggestion. So far no more issues.

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI problem create abap project
entry.content: if someone is asking "for free" this might be a clue that they do not have a S-user so reading notes is not possible.

entry.title: Re: Deprecated domains and Data elements - Pre conversion...
entry.content:
Hi,

the preferred way is to integrate the Transport Request of the dev system into the conversion in SUM as SPAU and SPDD transports. By this, the required changes are integrated in the DDIC activation already so that the activation errors that were already solved in dev will not appear in Q and PROD.

The procedure is described in the SUM Guide (Modification and Enhancement Adjustment Planning), and SAP Note 2207944 (Automatically incorporate these SAP Note implementations into the SUM procedure for other systems in the landscape).

If you also need to integrate other customer transports (not only SPAU/SPDD), e.g. for customizing, this is also possible with SUM. See SUM Guide: Integrating Customer Transports into the Update Procedure for more details.

Best regards, Florian

entry.title: Is Seamless Planning between SAC and SAP Datasphere active?
entry.content:
Good day,

Is the seamless planning functionality active, or is it still planned for a future release? I'm trying to use it, but I don't see the option to select the "Data Storage Location" when creating a new model in SAC. Additionally, I've noticed that in the administration section, under tenant links, there is no option to enter the URL for the Data Storage Location (SAP Datasphere). Please advise if seamless planning is active for any tenants or if it is still a feature that will be released later.

entry.title: Re: Important Notice: Changes in SAP Analytics Cloud Classic Stories & Analytic Applications
entry.content:
Dear @SteffenKoette, 

After configuring the tree structure, the filters work as expected when i use view mode, but not in present mode. If i use the default present mode, without configuring the tree structure, the filters work as expected in both modes, view and present. The bug I have is only with tables, the other objects work fine.

Kind regards

Marsida

entry.title: Error when uploading Data in the Manage Lookup Table Data App / Subscription Billing
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

i have the following issue when uploading Data in the Manage Lookup Table Data App in Subscription Billing.
For context, i first downloaded the empty exel file which contains the relevenat columns for the Lookup Table.
I then filled the Data sheet and tried to import it, while using the clear and replace setting. 

I then get the following error code: "In line number 2, the symbol in column "Lower Endpoint Symbol" is invalid. Use either "[" or "(". "
But i cant find any entry or line/colume which would relate to this error. I also checked the other sheets (e.g. which contain standard values like all currencies and conditions)

Can someone explain to me what this error can relate too ?

Best regards 
Lukas

entry.title: Re: Please advise how to write on WBS Budget Availability...
entry.content: Hello Susanne, thank you very much for getting back. I had seen the linked documentation, only it is very focus on Budget Availability Control for the Cost Center. For the Cost center, I understand SAC would write on the ACDOCP and Budget Availability Control would be able to read the Budget on the ACDOCP Budget Category once the Actuals are posted on the ACDOCA. However, would the same approach work for the WBS? Finally, to write on ACDOCP from SAC, could you confirm that the standard procedure to follow would be the following, https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/48f4b4785b8e45938ac44a67be8032d9/efee7f7a47844876a80565d50f1cffcd.html (SAC Data Management). Thank you very much!

entry.title: Re: Class and Characteristics in Material
entry.content:
Hi Haily, 

Please check the below link for documentation.

https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('CL24N')/S33

https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/implementing-classification-in-sap-s-4hana-cloud-private-edition/classifying-and-finding-objects-1

Thank you,

Best Regards

Thangaraj Thomas

entry.title: Re: How to Create a Reprocessing Rule for One-Step Postings of Bank Statement Items
entry.content: Where we can see the change log for particular rule that I changed.

entry.title: Skipping Onboarding and selecting process variants in Recruiting
entry.content:
Article written together with @Angela_Romano 

It is often that we receive requests to have candidates in a certain job requisition skip the Onboarding process based on certain criteria, or even to select whether specific candidates in the same job requisition should go to Onboarding or straight to Manage Pending Hires.

In some cases, the request is to select the Onboarding Process Variant on a case-by-case basis, including the possibility to skip Onboarding altogether.

In this post we will propose solutions for these scenarios:

  • Scenario 1: Requisition Specific -  Apply or skip Onboarding based on the value of a field in the Job Requisition
  • Scenario 2: Candidate Specific - Select the process variant or skip Onboarding on a case-by-case basis based on the value of a field in the Application or Offer Approval

 

Scenario 1: Requisition Specific

Sending the Candidate to Manage Pending Hires

  • The Recruiter will move the candidate to the Hirable status without the need to Initiate Onboarding
  • The Candidate will land in Manage Pending Hires under Recruiting item in the dropdown

Configuration needed - Recruiting

  • The field on which we can base the decision on whether to apply Onboarding or not needs to be a filter field. If it doesn’t exist yet, create it and permission it as needed.
  • Perform an OData Metadata Refresh
  • If not done yet, make sure to map necessary fields from Recruiting to EC via XML in Provisioning > Import/Export Candidate to employee integration template

Configuration needed – Onboarding

  • Go to Onboarding Integration Setup and select “Apply Onboarding to Job Requisitions that meet ANY of the following criteria”
  • Select your field and the values that should trigger Onboarding. Candidates in requisitions in which the value(s) selected are the value(s) you left out will not go to Onboarding and will go directly to Manage Pending hires under “Recruiting”

 

Scenario 2: Candidate Specific

In Recruiting, from within the candidate’s application form (Offer also works), the Recruiter can select the process to which they wish to send the candidate. In this example we have Full Process, Short Process, or No Onboarding.

No Onboarding:

It will still be necessary to initiate Onboarding from Recruiting. The new hire will land in the Onboarding Dashboard with no tasks assigned, but can be found in Manage Pending Hires immediately (under Onboarding in the dropdown) without any action needed in the Onboarding module.

Short Onboarding for quick hire

If “Short Process” was selected in Recruiting, after initiating Onboarding a process that only contains a New Hire Data Review Step and the Onboarding Tasks will apply.

Full Onboarding (default)

If “Full Process” was selected in Recruiting, after initiating Onboarding the full Onboarding process will apply.

Configuration needed – Recruiting

  • New custom field for Onboarding Type in the Application template (Offer Approval also works) – permissions to the application field granted to the Recruiter in the Ready to Hire/Send to Onboarding status
  • The field should use a picklist with the options (for example) “Full Onboarding Process”, “Short Onboarding Process”, “No Onboarding Process”
  • The field should be set as required, to prevent errors in case of Onboarding initiation without a process selected

Configuration needed – Employee Central

  • Rehire configuration – this is available in the Implementation Guide
  • New custom field for Onboarding Type in (for example) jobInfo – no permissions are necessary so it can remain invisible
  • The field should use the same picklist as the correspondent field in Recruiting

Configuration needed – Onboarding

  • New process variant for No Onboarding – this variant should contain no steps
  • Recruit-to-Hire mapping of the new fields in Recruiting and EC – from Application Template (or Offer, as applicable) in Recruiting to jobInfo in EC
  • Adjustment of the Process Variant Selection business rule based on the new field in jobInfo.

Advantages and disadvantages for each scenario

Scenario 1: Requisition Specific:

Advantages:

  • Simple configuration
  • Candidates in requisitions to which Onboarding doesn’t apply go straight to Manage Pending Hires without appearing in the Onboarding Dashboard
  • Streamlined based on conditions from the Job Requisition
  • All candidates go through the same process – compliant

Disadvantages:

  • Not flexible – candidates in the same requisition will have the option selected applicable to all
  • Doesn’t allow to select the process variant, only to select whether to trigger Onboarding or not

Scenario 2: Candidate specific

Advantages:

  • Flexibility to select different options for different candidates
  • Ability to cater for concurrent employment
  • Ability to decide the process variant for each candidate, or whether to skip Onboarding entirely

Disadvantages:

  • Candidates in the same requisition can go to different processes or none at all, raising concerns when it comes to compliance
  • Candidates will still land in the Onboarding Dashboard, only without any tasks assigned

entry.title: FIORI listing of reports
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are thinking of re-building some BW reports in FIORI using CDS views. Since we want to avoid issuing a individual FIORI tile for each report, is there a process documented on ways to group list of reports based on department or category? 

For e.g. a folder structure like

Finance>P&L> (all the list of reports - standard and custom made for FIORI reporting. So no FIORI tiles for reports , just a location where end user will get a report inventory list that shows all titles of reports that can be clicked to render the report.) 

the list of reports should,

1. be dynamic i.e.. should only list reports that are relevant for a particular user. (not only access/authorization but also irrelevant reports should not be visible).

2. Reports should open in browser on clicking the title. (similar to what happens in SAP Analytics cloud).

The reason we don't want to use SAC here , is that these reports are all tabular (originally BEx tabular only reports, no charts)

Regards,

Ratish

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI problem create abap project
entry.content:
@abdelmonim what are you trying to do exactly?

If you installed one of the so-called MiniSAP, then a version of the GUI is included in the package (since you would otherwise have no access to it)

If you are trying to use the ABAP environment in BTP (cloud) then the GUI is not needed at all.

Best Regards, Joerg Rolapp

entry.title: Re: Inbound Interface for Outgoing Invoices (FB70) in S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content: Hi, can you confirm it's possible to create a customer invoice (FI invoice) with the proposed API?

entry.title: Re: Blank Screen when extending the project using SAP Web...
entry.content:
Hi lokijana,

I had this issue in the past when I was still working on customer side and it was always related to CORS issues. I normally fixed it by using a browser extension like CORS Unblock, which was easier than explaining it to administrators and waiting for them to fix it. You should be able to see in the Network tab of the Chrome Developer Tools if this is the case.

BR,
Alex

entry.title: Intercompany sales process possible between S/4 HANA on prem and S/4 HANA Cloud, public edition?
entry.content:
Hi,

I need to clarify, if the usage of the Intercompany sales process between S/4 HANA on prem system and S/4 HANA Cloud, public edition is possible. The on premise system is located in Germany, the Cloud-System is hosted in the US. The cloud system belongs to the US subsidiary. The headquarter is based in Germany and uses the on premise system. Both companies have different company codes as they are currently processed in two systems.

To make things easier between both parties, the Intercompany sales process is one idea. Would it work or do you have any better solutions?

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: Print Form Adaptation in Sales/Service 2: Get XML data for preview in Adobe LiveCycle Designer
entry.content:
Hi @Felix_Wyskocil 

thanks a lot for this informative blog. As you know, in V1 when we need to use a Custom Field in our Form, we needed to make it available for Form use from adaptation mode. In V2, do we need to do some settings for Custom Fields?

Best Regards,
Irfan

entry.title: Re: MaxDB restore failing
entry.content: Hello James, many thanks for the reply! Yes, we have antivirus, I thinkg TrendMicro. They have restored again the backup file from the backup Server. Now I am copying it and will try another restore, just of that backup, without PIT. Will report back how it went! THANKS !!!

entry.title: Re: SAP IBP - Q : Can we copy current week data from Sour...
entry.content:
Sagar,

Yes you can. 2 options. 

1- Using the Copy operator, you can copy source to target with a given period shift. Really not fancy if you need to do this for several target period as you have to copy the first then the second etc..

2- Using formula on a dummy keyf that collects the source data and then replicate it. In the end in the copy operator you take this dummy and copy it to the target keyf. Again nothing fancy compared to an excel logic for instance

Hope it helps

entry.title: SAP Fieldglass - Quick Win Features - Episode 2
entry.content:
Greetings!

Fabian here to continue our journey through the SAP Fieldglass Quick Win Features. First and foremost, I want to wish everyone a very happy new year! I hope you had the chance to unwind and enjoy some quality time with your loved ones.

In today's blog post, we'll dive into the standout features from the latest major Fieldglass release, which I believe will be incredibly valuable to our customers. Be sure to explore the links provided throughout for more detailed information.

Layout Manager

The new Layout Manager admin object is now available, empowering administrators to design home page layouts tailored to specific User Roles. This enhancement allows Buyer users to access content relevant to their daily tasks, creating a personalized experience that aligns with the unique needs of each role. Four default layouts are provided: Administrator Layout, Finance and Reporting Layout, Hiring Manager Layout and PMO Layout. While these defaults cannot be edited or removed, they can be associated with User Roles through an association tree. You can also create custom layouts to suit any User Role requirements. Please note: users can no longer customize their home pages via the My Preferences tab; all personalization must now be done through the Layout Manager admin object.

Learn more about Home Page Layout Manager

Use Flexible Skills & Certifications

As part of our Total Workforce Management initiative, we aim to sync Fieldglass Qualifications with SuccessFactors Skills. This will streamline skill searching and matching across both internal and external talent pools.  Customers can now define custom assessment scales for job seekers. For instance, a French Language Skill might use a 6-point scale, whereas a Japanese Language Skill might use a 5-point scale. The Flexible Assessment Scale feature allows for both. Once enabled, existing qualifications in the library will be locked and new qualifications will be simplified to either 'Certification' or 'Flexible', allowing for custom scales. Additionally, a new "Flexible Assessment Scale" menu item has been added under the Worker tile.

Discover more about Flexible Assessment Scale

New Inactive Status for Cost Centers

Introducing a new "Inactive" status for Cost Centers! This update works with the newly renamed Company Configuration: preventing the approval of Time Sheets, Expense Sheets, and Miscellaneous Invoices linked to closed or inactive Cost Centers. With this configuration, approval is not possible if any Cost Centers on the item are closed or inactive, accompanied by a warning message. This change ensures that formerly used Cost Centers, which are critical for reporting, remain part of active documents like Job Postings or Statements of Work.

Get details on the New Inactive Status for Cost Centers

Stay tuned for more updates and insights as we continue exploring SAP Fieldglass features or check out previous episodes: SAP Fieldglass - Quick Win Features - SAP Community.

Furthermore, I would also encourage you to check out Amreen´s series on AI which is a major focus area at SAP Fieldglass right now:  The AI Adoption Journey with SAP Fieldglass - SAP Community

I appreciate you taking the time to read my blog & I hope you stay tuned for the next episode.

entry.title: Re: Operator wants to see SFC data after completion
entry.content:
How about adding a production process to the complete button on the POD that retrieves the data collects, formats them into a message and display it in the POD using the POD Message service ? Or you could create a custom POD plugin to do the same.

Thanks

Kevin

entry.title: Unified access to documentation about Identity and Access Management on SAP Help Portal
entry.content:
Benefit from the one-stop shop for identity and access management (IAM) documentation on SAP Help Portal.
Get an overview of apps for user and identity management, roles and authorization, and authentication.
Additionally, let the documentation guide you through the tasks related to IAM for the different implementation phases (prepare, realize, run, and upgrade) for SAP S/4HANA Cloud and integrated products. This includes documentation on initial system access and on tasks that need to be completed before, during, and after the upgrade of SAP S/4HANA Cloud solutions.

Preview: one-stop shop for identity and access management (IAM) documentation

Interested? 

Identity and access management (IAM) documentation on SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Re: RAP Business Events with Advanced Event Mesh [2]: Creating custom business events
entry.content:
Hi @TimoMaier ,

Can i call the method on_SalesOrder_Created from SAP ABAP after the sales order is being saved (in MV45AFZZ)?

I have right now only implemented the local event handler method implementation.

 

About adding Z fields in the custom CDS view - I tried that method but getting some errors when trying to add the custom Z field.

I used I_SalesOrder to create a view entity. the custom fields i want included are in VBAK and I_SalesOrder is not based on VBAK. I_SalesDocumentBasic is the one based on VBAK. How can i extend I_SalesDocumentBasic and then extend I_SalesOrder.

 

Thanks,

Smohan

entry.title: Custom Value Help Creation For a Perticular Field In SAP RAP.
entry.content:
This blog is about implementing value help using custom entity.

This is one of the way to implement value help.

Introduction 

 In SAP RAP (Restful ABAP Programming), a custom entity refers to a user-defined data model that represents business data specific to your needs. It’s typically created using Core Data Services (CDS) views and exposed as an OData service for consumption in applications like Fiori.

Custom entities in RAP empower developers to create tailored data models that fit unique business scenarios while easily integrating with SAP's cloud and UI platforms.

The custom entity provides a structure and implements the logic via an ABAP class. The entity itself does not contain any data but must always be called by the SADL framework first. This is why custom entities are mainly used in RAP applications.

In this blog we will make Value help for Status field In our RAP Project.

Final Output :-

 

 

Implementation

In the first step, we begin by creating the Core Data Service and the ABAP class.

1. Class

Since the class in the annotation is also checked when the custom entity is created, we implement the empty class first.

To do this, we create the class and use the interface IF_RAP_QUERY_PROVIDER, which expects the custom entity.

 

 

CLASS zcl_status_query DEFINITION
  PUBLIC
  FINAL
  CREATE PUBLIC .

  PUBLIC SECTION.

    INTERFACES if_rap_query_provider .
  PROTECTED SECTION.
  PRIVATE SECTION.
ENDCLASS.


CLASS zcl_status_query IMPLEMENTATION.

  METHOD if_rap_query_provider~select.
* write logic here


  ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

 

2. Core Data Service

In the next step, we create the Core Data Service using the context menu. We use the CDS template "defineCustomEntityWithParameters" as a template:-

 

 

 Now Add This annotation at CDS

 

@ObjectModel.query.implementedBy: 'ABAP:ZCL_STATUS_QUERY'

 

Now We will create two fields:

  • First we create a status field with appropriate data type. In this we will enter the description of the status field.
  •  The next field is the short description of the status. ( ex: N   = New ).

Since we are using built-in data types, we also set the label and tooltip for the user so that the texts appear in the UI.

 

@EndUserText.label: 'Value Help cds for status data element'
@ObjectModel.query.implementedBy: 'ABAP:ZCL_STATUS_QUERY'
define custom entity ZCDi_status_VH
{
    @EndUserText.label: 'Status'
    @EndUserText.quickInfo: 'Currently available status'
    key status : abap.char(10);
    
    @EndUserText.label: 'Status(Short)'
    @EndUserText.quickInfo: 'Short Name for the status'
    Status_short : abap.char(1);
     
}

 

We have now created the basic elements that we need for the search help. In this section we implement the necessary logic to see data in the UI.

 To do this, we bind the search help to the field in the projection view.

 

   @Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: [{ entity: { name: 'ZCDI_STATUS_VH', element: 'status' } }]
      Status,

 

 

Since value help must also be released externally, you should include the view in your service definition.

(NOTE: Expose only if you did association with the custom CDS. In this case we will do ) .

 

@EndUserText.label: 'Employee table service defination'
define service Zsd_empheader {
  expose zcdp_Empheader;
  expose zcdp_address;
  expose zcdp_items;
  expose ZCDi_status_VH;
}

 

3. Extending the previously defined class

Let's now extend the query class with the logic we need to be able to use the value help easily. To do this, we need an internal table with the data type of the custom entity. We fill this with the appropriate data

 

    DATA: lt_create TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF  zcdi_status_vh WITH EMPTY KEY.

    lt_create = VALUE #( ( status = 'New'         Status_short = 'N' )
                          ( status = 'Completed'  Status_short = 'C' )
                           ( status = 'Invalid'   Status_short = 'I' )
                            ( status = 'Pending'  Status_short = 'P' )
     ).


    IF io_request->is_data_requested( ).
      io_response->set_data( lt_create ).
    ENDIF.

    IF io_request->is_total_numb_of_rec_requested( ).
      io_response->set_total_number_of_records( lines( lt_create ) ).
    ENDIF.

    io_request->get_sort_elements( ).
    io_request->get_paging( ).

 

 

To return the data, we still have to call the appropriate REPSONSE methods. Here it is important to only call the methods if the framework requests it, otherwise an error will occur. Therefore, we first ask whether the fields have been requested and then call the method. It is also important that the two methods must always be implemented and should not, for example, be in a TRY/CATCH, where they may not be called if an error occurs

 

 

    IF io_request->is_data_requested( ).
      io_response->set_data( lt_create ).
    ENDIF.

    IF io_request->is_total_numb_of_rec_requested( ).
      io_response->set_total_number_of_records( lines( lt_create ) ).
    ENDIF.

 

 

In addition to this method, we also must call the GET_PAGING method, for which we receive a similar error. The call to the methods must be implemented within the method call.

 

    io_request->get_sort_elements( ).
    io_request->get_paging( ).

 

 

Now  we have to associate our custom cds with the root cds where status field is present and expose the custom status entity.

 

association  to ZCDi_status_VH   as _status       on  $projection.Status = _status.status.

*expose it
_status,

 

 

  • status -> Field in the custom entity.
  • Status -> field in the root CDS.
  •  

Result :-

 

On Clicking value help , value help window will appear.

 

On clicking to the required status, it will populate In the field.

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI problem create abap project

entry.title: Re: Error of specific Chinese/Japanese/Korean characters at adobe form printout
entry.content: "PDFasRAW" works for my case, thanks a lot!

entry.title: Re: Change Record in S4HANA - A New Look to ECR/ECO in S4HANA
entry.content: Do the changes to the versioned BOM, recorded against the change record once after completion?

entry.title: SAPAATP supply protection system should not calculates the committed qty based on future time bucket
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

Please help me to clear regarding AATP supply protection functionality. Available stock 90, I have Allocated 40qty for Customer-1 (current week), 40qty for Customer 1 (future week), 30 qty for customer-2 (Current week), 30 qty for customer-2 (Future week).

If Customer-2 Low priority place an order (Current week) with 30qty system is committed only 10qty, (Avl stock 90-80(Allocated stock customer-1)=10).

System should not be considered future allocated qty of customer-1, where can be restricted?

Could you please help me.

    20/1/202527/1/2025
  Priority Protected qtyAllocated qty Allocated qty 
Order 2ndCustomer 1High804040
Order 1stCustomer 2Low603030
  Req qty Committed qty 
1Customer 13010
2Customer 28080

Thanks

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI problem create abap project
entry.content: It is not possible to create an abap project in a vacuum, you need access to a SAP system. This has to be installed and provided to you by your employer (easiest), or it may be one of the demos (so called MiniSAP, search for it) or the cloud version (search for BTP trial)

entry.title: Re: Build Process Automation - Monitoring Tiles to WZ
entry.content:
Hello Archana,

I cant see Processes and Workflows tile under Manage in monitoring in SAP build process automation, while testing the BTP workflow in SAP BTP trial account

Can u please help me regarding this.

Thank you in advance

entry.title: b1if, use of table name and table field name in payload
entry.content:
the following payload used to work in b1if for creating BOM, but it no longer works after upgrading to version 2411.  

now instoad of <OITT> it has to be <ProductTrees>. 

anyone knows why? 

 

<BOM>
  <BO>
    <AdmInfo>
      <Object>66</Object>
    </AdmInfo>
    <OITT>
      <row>
        <Code>A00001</Code>
      </row>
    </OITT>
    <ITT1>
      <row>
        <Code>R300004</Code>
        <Quantity>1.0</Quantity>
        <Type>290</Type>
      </row>
      <row>
        <Code>A00002</Code>
        <Quantity>1.0</Quantity>
        <Type>4</Type>
      </row>
    </ITT1>
  </BO>
</BOM>

entry.title: Re: I'd like to configure the SAP Destination service to use a certificate issued by private CA.
entry.content:
Dear WouterLemaire,

Thank you for your reply.

I created a private CA using OpenSSL and issued a server certificate using it.
Even after setting the pem file containing the CA certificate, server certificate, and intermediate certificate to the destination's trust store location, I get a 502 Bad Gateway error when connecting from the Approuter.

entry.title: S4 Public Edition - Incorrect Public Sector Activation in CBC
entry.content:
Hi,

In the customer system, we by mistake activated the evaluation project in CBC system as "Public Sector". The solution is now activated. We want to revert this and re-active as Private. What is the process for this?

entry.title: Re: Previewing Fiori Standard Extension Project on BAS
entry.content: Many Thanks for the reply.

entry.title: Re: MDG Cloud Ready Mode: Custom Workflow template in SAP build process automation with S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi Mustafa,

For MDG cloud ready mode, the release cycle is as per the new 2 years release schedule given by SAP for S/4HANA. As a result, you see product cloud ready mode in the product vision for later this year and it would be interesting to see as we get closer to Q2 what hints SAP is providing.

Coming to the quarterly release, that's only for cloud product lines not for on-prem or private cloud product lines. To my point of SAP being aggressively working on cloud ready mode, I wanted to imply that they are releasing features to make the business partner object more usable and closer to the classic mode, in terms of the data model coverage, workflow capabilities, integration with other cloud solutions like Ariba, incorporation of Joule etc. They are also making it more low code, no-code where key users can perform simple configuration tasks very easily.

Regards

Anirban

entry.title: Enhancement to Update NAST in VA02
entry.content:
Hi All,
I have an output type that is triggered when a custom Z field is updated. This Z field gets updated through a BAPI during the creation of a Post Goods Receipt (PGR) in an STO process. The output sends an email with PO details, which are populated from the updated Z field.

I initially tried using Memory ID to pass the value, but I encountered an issue. When two PGRs are created within a few seconds, the first output picks up the PO value of the second PGR due to the shared nature of Memory IDs. To avoid this, I thought of updating unused fields in the output type instead.

I need an enhancement (user exit or BAdI) to update the output type during the save process in VA02. Could anyone guide me on the best approach or enhancement point to achieve this?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Cost Center Commitments in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

Can we return or transfer the budget assigned to a commitment if the actual procurement (GR) is less than the PR, leaving an outstanding balance that has already consumed the available budget?

entry.title: Re: Previewing Fiori Standard Extension Project on BAS
entry.content: Many thanks for the reply. However, when looking through all the documentations, there was not enough guide for previewing extension project on BAS. Normally when previewing a custom fiori application, we can use real service data by starting fiori run. But for extension projects, it only have the component or files that was extended using extension point available for the standard app. How are we able to preview the extension projects on SAP BAS ? Many Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Fiori Adoptation Project for Extending Standard Fiori Application for onPremise using BAS
entry.content: What is template wizard? which software is required to create the fiori apps

entry.title: Fiori Standard App Extensions
entry.content:
Hi,

Does anyone know how the FIORI extension projects are linked back to get their main app ?

And is there such linkage needed to preview the extension projects using live data on BAS ?

Many thanks.

entry.title: Re: Unable to purchase CER006 certification subscription
entry.content: Hi All, You have to raise a ticket in help center, SAP India will send you the details of payment for your certification booking, after the payment they will provide you the subscription access

entry.title: Passing data from one session to another session
entry.content:
Hi,

I need to pass data from one LUW to another in my SAP system. Initially, I tried using Memory ID, but I encountered issues when multiple sessions attempted to update the same Memory ID simultaneously.

In my system, Shared Memory is not allowed, so I am exploring other options. I am considering using a persistence mechanism, but I don’t want to create a custom Z table to store the data.

Is there a way to achieve this using standard SAP features, such as persistent objects, temporary cluster tables, or any other alternatives?

Thanks in advance for your suggestions!

entry.title: currency_conversion() function is showing error for cds view entity.
entry.content:
I've created a cds view entity( define view entity <view_name>) with some elements and added currency_conversion() function to convert currency from 'USD' to 'EUR' it is showing error as-
ZD_TRAVEL_2-AUDCURR reference information missing or data type wrong, see long text ZD_TRAVEL_2 

-------- Same code is not showing error for cds view i.e., define view <view_name>

entry.title: Re: I am trying to create a virtual element for the CDS v...
entry.content:
How about using LOCALIZED then?

Docu for LOCALIZED: CDS DDL - LOCALIZED | ABAP Keyword Documentation

entry.title: Validation of UK VAT ID in SAP
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support Team,

 

We need your assistance in understanding the SAP source link/portal which is used to check if a particular UK VAT ID is valid or invalid.

Kindly help us understand how the validation for UK VAT IDs is performed in the SAP system.

 

Thanks in advance!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Validation of UK VAT ID in SAP
entry.content:
Hello,

 

The validation of the VAT registration number is based on:

For the 9-digit scheme, the 2-digit block containing the 8th and 9th digits is always in the range 00 to 96 and is derived from a weighted modulus-97 check number (an identical algorithm is used for the 12-digit scheme, ignoring the extra 3-digit block) 

The current modulus-97 series ran out during 2010, so a parallel series of numbers was introduced from November 2009 for new registrations, restarting at 100 nnnn nn and following the same format but with the last two digits derived from an alternative algorithm known as "9755".

The algorithm is identical to the one for the established series except that 55 is subtracted to give the check number (modulus 97), so the check number is either 55 less than or (if this would be negative) 42 greater than the check number that a VAT number in the established series would have if it were identical in the first seven digits.  

 

Best regards,

Agnes

entry.title: Re: Previewing Fiori Standard Extension Project on BAS
entry.content:
Hi,
As mentioned in the documentation, running an SAPUI5 extension project for SAP Fiori application, is the same as running any custom Fiori application from SAP Business Application Studio.
The runtime of the Component.js code from the extension project is loading the original SAP Fiori application from the On-Premise system (selected when the extension project was created), including live service data (as defined in the original application). Only changes (extensions) from the original application are provided in the code of the extension project itself (and those are applied at runtime).
If this is not working as expected at runtime, please check the extension project was created / migrated correctly according to the documentation, and open an official support ticket if needed.

Thanks,
Rotem

entry.title: Re: STO value fetch using BAPI
entry.content: Did you already try BAPI_PO_GETDETAIL[1] parameters PO_ITEM_HISTORY* for STO ?

entry.title: Re: Identity and Authentication Management in SAP Business One
entry.content:
Hello,

we are using SAP B1 FP 2405 with entra ad. We activated only the entra Identity Providers in SLD.  

In the first view everything seems to be working correct (login via DestopClient, WebClient,DTW using SSO) but I still able to login via Postman with Username and Password to our Service Layer. I am able to register a SSO Extension and use the Token (like descript here https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/developing-extensions-for-sap-business-one-and-the-web-client/logging-in-and-logging-out-using-service-layer-api). But in parallel still the Username and Password is working fine to connect to SAP B1 via Service Layer. 

Is that correct that I can still use the B1 Username and Password for login into Service Layer when SSO is activated?

Or does I miss something ?

also B1iF SLD Connection and my Addons was working without any changes -> all still using the B1 Username and Password. 

best regards, 

Andrea

entry.content:

technically you should be able to call the method from any ABAP code.

In regards to the derived events, if the fields aren't directly accessible through I_SalesOrder, you can try to join the tables if possible.

Timo

entry.title: Why do I still report an error after using a dynamic DELETE statement?
entry.content:
Hello everyone:
I defined an inner table using any table in the function change parameter, and after checking, I cleared the non-eligible table rows.
Finally, I'm going to use DELETE ct_tab WHERE ('table_line IS INITIAL') to delete the unwanted data, but it still reports an error, prompting:
The row type of the table must be identifiable statically in "... WHERE...".
How can I adjust?
Thanks.
PS: Use DELETE ct_tab WHERE table_line IS INITIAL The same error.

entry.title: Re: Assigning WBS elements to a Service Order
entry.content:
Hello,

This is not a bug. When you assign a WBS element to a Service Order, the WBS element is not automatically assigned to the Purchasing Requisition. 

Best regards,

Dequan Xu

entry.title: Re: Error when uploading Data in the Manage Lookup Table...
entry.content:
Hi Lukas, 
your lookup table appears to have a quantity range field configured. These ranges allow you to define numeric intervals to locate the relevant row in the table. For more details, please refer to the documentation on quantity ranges.

In the downloaded Excel file, six columns are dedicated to these ranges. Here's how to fill them out:
- Columns 1 & 6: Use inclusion/exclusion symbols.
- Columns 2 & 3: Input the lower quantity.
- Columns 4 & 5: Input the higher quantity.

An example: 

Best regards,
Carsten

entry.title: Re: Deprecation of SuccessFactors Learning Token Server

entry.title: Re: MDG Cloud Ready Mode: Custom Workflow template in SAP build process automation with S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi Anirban,

Thanks for the clarification on the usage of your My Inbox app with regards to this scenario. 
From your screenshot of the inbox message, I can only see a general notification message and no detailed information as we are used to from the Inbox app within "classic" MDG workflows. It might be hidden in your screenshot, but I think to make this scenario more user-friendly, you would want at least to have functionalities from your inbox to see where the requests comes from / forward or substitute options / display workflow log etc. 

BR, Frederik

Soma

entry.content: thanks a lot for this valuable information

entry.title: Re: what's the difference between edit_mask and convexit in alv Field Catalog?
entry.content: An edit mask can be an actual edit mask such as '_,__.___',___' but it also allow use an existing conversion exit, using prefix '=='

entry.content: Very useful blog, thanks 🙂

entry.title: LIVE SESSION - SAP Enterprise Support Advisory Council
entry.content:
Power your success with guidance and self-service content.

SAP Enterprise Support is the foundational support offering from SAP and is included within your SAP cloud subscription. The SAP Enterprise Support Advisory Council is our innovation program which provides the unique opportunity for our customers to directly influence and shape the SAP Enterprise Support content portfolio. Join this session to ask questions live and find out more about the workstreams in Q1 2025, covering SAP Analytics Cloud, SAP Datasphere, SAP BTP, SAP Cloud ALM.

About SAP Enterprise Support Advisory Council: https://support.sap.com/esac
About SAP Enterprise Support Value Maps: https://support.sap.com/valuemaps

🎤 Speakers:

Alexander Daum - Global Head, SAP Enterprise Support Advisory Council

Bruno Cherqui - Operational Lead, SAP Enterprise Support Advisory Council

 

➡️Host: Larissa Brinkmann - Global SAP User Groups Organization

entry.title: Costing Relevancy Not Updating properly with CSAP_MAT_BOM_CREATE
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am using FM CSAP_MAT_BOM_CREATE to create BOM. I was able to create the BOM successfully. 

But my problem is in the table T_STPO I am passing the REL_COST indicator as empty. Which is to indicate not relevant to costing. But even I keep this empty and execute the FM, when I check the table STPO it takes as 'X' for this field which is to indicate that it's relevant for costing.

My goal is set the Checkbox for 'Indicator: Item Relevant to Costing' initial. When I pass the value ' '[Space] to the structure field 'T_STPO-REL_COST' it doen't work.

Please let me know how can I achieve this? Do I have to maintain another table or field to archive this or should I ?

entry.title: Re: BTP Trial version, Open Excel Instance of irpa_Excel is diabled
entry.content: Checkout this blogpost https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-build-process-automation-coming-soon-on-macos/ba-p/13577794

entry.title: Re: S4 HANA Graph Workspace with LangChain
entry.content:
@merbinjanselm 
No, we don't generate vector-embedding for user query. We find unspecified data using LLM. Then we make vector search on unspecified data and replace it with <node_type> + <unspecified_data>, if the similarity score is more than 0.88.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud - Usage Statistics (System Overview)

Thank you in advance for your response!

Kind regards,

Vaclav

entry.title: SD_BILL_DATA_TRANSFER Badi Implementation is not working
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am have implemented the following badi "SD_BILL_DATA_TRANSFER" in order to convert the quantity of material/line item from TON to KG . I have tried passing the data into custom field which I have created to show the quantity conversion value but the issue is the converted value is not visible when I test or check in "display billing documents " or "change billing documents" app in sap public cloud.

Please suggest me a solution so that I can fulfill the requirement . I have used the following code to convert the value from ton to KG, I have used "907.185" value for conversion. My code is working in test mode but its not showing data at actual app. Your feedback would be highly valuable. 

Also, please suggest if I am using correct Badi or do I have to use another one to achieve the requirement ?

thanks,

Rajvardhan Patil

entry.title: How do I find out what transaction is used in a certain SAP Help Portal article?
entry.content:
Hello experts,

a reoccuring issue I have is that when I search for some topics one of the first results leads me to the SAP Help page which lists steps to solve my issue. E.g. I was looking for a way to edit a CDS view in my SAP GUI client instead of using the ADT tool. The SAP Help Portal suggested to "open the Custom CDS Views app" and proceed from there onwards. But nowhere in the entire page (and I try really not to swear but it is really, really bugging me) can I find what the actual transaction code is. I have to open a new tab and spend much more time finding the transaction/report code for this.

Can someone please tell me how I can find it out more easily?

Big thanks in advance!

entry.title: A warm welcome to our new SAP Champions in January 2025
entry.content:
Wishing a warm welcome to our latest additions to the SAP Champions family! Being accepted into one of our programs is seen as a top recognition, so the members should be very proud indeed. It’s great to add a new diverse mix of both expertise and location to say the least. We plan to expand this further.

About the program
The SAP Champions program was founded in 2019 and is one of two prestigious programs in SAP Community, the other being the SAP Mentors program. The SAP Champions program provides the framework to enable our top contributors across SAP Community & ecosystem to operate at their full potential, while also connecting community leaders to one another.

About community
Community is all about connecting people. Seeing people learn from one another, share their ideas and experiences, support one another, get involved in discussions and much more!

Who are SAP Champions?
SAP Champions are the role models and leaders making SAP Community a more inclusive and receptive environment where all individuals are welcome to seek help and exchange knowledge. They have tremendous community spirit that radiates across SAP Community as well as in their own local communities where they reside. They are passionate people who advocate for software adoption and all things SAP Community related.

Heartiest congratulations to our newest members!

Daniel Mateo, SpainMarco Buescher, Germany
Hilal Kurt, TurkeyNatallia Shtura, Poland
Khaled Elghali, GermanySandra Solis, Mexico
Lluís Salvador, SpainTsovinar Chugaszyan, Germany
Manuel Robalinho, BrazilWalid Ben Sabeur, France


What makes a great SAP Champion?
Being a top contributor across SAP Community & ecosystem for one! Read more.

Help us to welcome them!
Please join us in welcoming these amazing candidates by leaving a comment below!



@DanielMateo @Hilal_Kurt @Khaled_Elghali @Lluis @MRobalinho 
@marcobuescher @natallia_shtura @Sandra_Solis @Tsovinar @walid 
@StephanieMarley @christoph_christophersen @lauraschmitz @marco_v_santos

entry.title: What’s New in SAP Central Business Configuration 2409 FD3
entry.content:
With the latest release for SAP Central Business Configuration, exciting new features are available. This blog post will provide you with a comprehensive overview of these features.

Simplified User Experience for Milestones

In our ongoing efforts to streamline the user experience, we've merged the Scoping is Completed milestone with the Complete Activity button in the Define Scope app. This means that once you've defined your scope, you can simply choose Complete Activity to confirm it. This action will, just as before, initiate the loading of your scope into the workspace, as well as the calculation of relevant configuration activities. That’s why the Assign Deployment Target activity has become the first one in the Activities list on the Overview page in order to improve the workflow.

Additionally, we've updated some of the activity descriptions and naming for clarity. For example, the milestone previously known as Confirm Scope and Organizational Structure Phase is Completed is now referred to as the Deploy Scope and Organizational Structure activity. What’s more, you can initiate the deployment of your scope and organizational structure also from the Deployment Target app. These changes aim to make the process more intuitive and understandable.

Screenshot of the scope confirmation in the Define Scope app

Enhanced Terminology

To better reflect the nature of your activities and improve overall terminology, we've replaced the term “project” with “workspace” throughout SAP Central Business Configuration. This update aligns with the retirement of the “project” concept since SAP Central Business Configuration mainly serves as a tool for configuration, and not for project management.

Screenshot of the updated terminology in the Settings app

Unified Themes for the In-App Help

To provide a cohesive and seamless user experience, we've aligned the theme of the in-app help with the theme you select in your personal user settings. This ensures that your experience remains consistent and visually appealing, reducing any potential disconnect caused by differing themes.

Screenshot of the light theme of the in-app help

For a quick summary, check out this video about What's New in 2409 FD3. Don’t forget to also use the What’s New Viewer on the SAP Help Portal, which provides further details and links about all the recent changes.

That wraps up the new features this time. Make sure to follow the SAP Central Business Configuration tag or follow this dedicated blog collection to stay up to date with the latest blog posts.

Do you have an idea on how to further enhance SAP Central Business Configuration? Go to the SAP Customer Influence portal to submit an improvement request or vote for the ideas of others. This helps us understand your requirements even better and prioritize our work accordingly. We’re looking forward to your improvement requests.

entry.title: Re: Skipping Onboarding and selecting process variants in Recruiting
entry.content: Nice Blog  @CarolinaCLeite  and @Angela_Romano 😊

entry.title: Re: Tax Return in SAP

entry.title: Re: Purchase order Release strategy's status is wrong in ME23N
entry.content: Hello, please provide more information, add print screens of the entire configuration. In short, mostlikely there is a problem in the release strategy setup.

entry.title: Re: FIORI listing of reports
entry.content: After researching a bit more about CDS views, it looks to me as if you need to make a custom report for each category and put those "general reports" in a tile which you then put in a role and group then with Tile groups. Each report has a treeview or ALV grid which (when doubleclicked) does a SELECT on the CDS View and displays the data in a ALV. You can handle this with Dynpro. Woud be my approach. But I admit, there could be better ones 😉

entry.title: Re: b1if, use of table name and table field name in payload
entry.content:
Hello,

 

I also didn't found in the version documentation the reason behind this change.

If you replace OITT by "ProductTree" and ITT1 by "ProductTree_Lines" in the payload, it works?

 

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Unable to purchase CER006 certification subscription
entry.content: @Arun85 The current accepted answer here is to change the country flag to book the exam. Are you saying that this solution doesn't work, and the OP has posted a wrong solution?

entry.title: Re: Bring Qualtrics Data to SAP Datasphere
entry.content: Will there be a standard connector from Qualtrics to Datasphere in the future? Are there any plans?

entry.title: Need Help with Column-Level Data Access Control in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I am currently working on a project in SAP Datasphere where I need to implement column-level data access control. Specifically, I want to restrict access to certain columns in my tables or models based on user roles. For example:

  • The finance team should only see finance-related columns, while inventory-related columns should be hidden from them.

In addition, I have created a story where:

  • Management can view all the KPI columns coming from the model in Datasphere.
  • If the sales team accesses the same story, only the sales-related KPIs should be displayed, while the rest of the KPIs are hidden.

Questions:

  1. How can I implement this scenario in SAP Datasphere?
  2. Are there any detailed steps or best practices to dynamically filter columns based on user roles in stories?

Any guidance, resources, or similar use case examples would be extremely helpful!

Thanks in advance for your assistance.

entry.title: SAP Datasphere to Power BI connectivity via OData API
entry.content:
Hi,

I need to connect Microsoft Power BI via SAP Datasphere. It can be done in both ways via ODBC connector or O-Data connectivity. What are the present Pros & Cons of OData API connection over ODBC connector. If anyone can elaborate that will be helpful .

Also there are few questions regarding Import connection between Power BI & Datasphere via OData.

  • Are Data builder & Business Builder both supported here or not ?
  • If Analytical model is exposed to Power BI via import mode is there any data volume limitation present or how much data volume is allowed ?
  • There are few problems already present like Aggregation, Hierarchy is not supported, if parameter is present then value needs to be passed like that. Apart from these problems is there any major problem which can be blocker ? Also, is there any SAP route map for solving blockers ?

    Please let me know about above questions mentioned. Any SAP notes relevant will be helpful. 

     

    Thanks & Regards

    Sonia Parvin

entry.title: Re: MaxDB restore failing
entry.content: And one more question - when doing ONLINE backup - does the backup file contain the logs from the backup duration integrated, like in Hana and Sybase for example ?

entry.title: Re: b1if, use of table name and table field name in payload
entry.content: It works when using "ProducTrees" and "ProductTrees_Lines". I was hoping to find out if there is any document on this change. if it's possible to get old behaviour back. at least, which version introduced the change.

entry.title: SAC story variable prompt screen - change default mode from range to member selection
entry.content:
Hello,

I am building a story (optimized design) based on a BW Live Data Model. One of the variables in the underlying BW query is the Company code, which I need to be a mandatory variable with user input, no initial value. I already set it up as intended at query level.

The issue is, when the story is opened and the variable prompt pops up, the default mode to input the Company code is always a range (see screenshot).

Is there a way for the prompt to default to the "=" mode for user input? As in the second screenshot below?

I know the users can just switch the mode manually every time, but I am trying to improve user experience and get the variable prompt to default to "=", instead of "[ ]". Is this possible at all?

Thanks for your help!
